subtitle: A dune-backed beach with no road to it: you reach Barafundle only on foot, over a half-mile cliff path and a flight of steps the Cawdor family built into their own deer-park wall.
spike_statement: Barafundle has no road and no facilities on the sand; the only way in is a half-mile walk from Stackpole Quay over the Cawdors' 18th-century wall.
